executionOrder.label: Prework: v2.0.1 fix obligation, skill registration, eval fixture prep, pre-dispatch gate
Tech Spike: Canvas 2 @xyflow custom hierarchy feasibility
Batch 3: Canvas 4 ChapterPacket three detail modes (CN-MET-04)
Final Gate: full acceptance, contract chain 46/46, e2e, ai-eval >= 14

constraints.serialExecution: Each batch (T-002~T-005) must pass per-batch acceptance before the next starts. No parallel canvas work.
constraints.spikePrerequisite: T-001 spike verdict must be FEASIBLE before T-005 begins. If INFEASIBLE, T-005 is BLOCKED.
constraints.p1Deferral: T-006 (P1) may be deferred to v2.1.1 if all P0 batches are accepted but time/context budget runs low.
constraints.skillRegistry: All 5 skills registered in T-000 before any batch runs
constraints.v201FixObligation: >= 80% fixes applied by T-000, verified in T-007
constraints.dbMode: Additive only in all tickets. No ALTER TABLE, no migration, no existing table changes.
constraints.aiInfra: All AI through v2.0.2 Foundation (Command Router, Structured Output Parser). No new infra.

fileConflictWarnings.src/contracts/premise.contract.ts: Modified by T-002 (CN-MET-01 additive). No other ticket touches this.
fileConflictWarnings.src/contracts/setting.contract.ts: Modified by T-003 (CN-MET-03) and potentially T-006 (TianDiRenLayer). T-006 must check if TianDiRenLayer already added in T-003.
fileConflictWarnings.src/contracts/chapter-packet.contract.ts: Modified by T-004 (CN-MET-04 additive). No other ticket touches this.
fileConflictWarnings.src/contracts/structure.contract.ts: Modified by T-005 (CN-MET-02 additive). No other ticket touches this.
fileConflictWarnings.src-tauri/src/db.rs: Modified by T-000 (none), T-002 (+1 table), T-003 (+2 tables), T-004 (+1 table), T-005 (+1 table), optionally T-006 (+1 table). Additive only — no ALTER TABLE.
fileConflictWarnings.src-tauri/src/models.rs: Modified by T-002 (+1 struct), T-003 (+3 structs), T-004 (+2 structs), T-005 (+3 structs), optionally T-006 (+1 struct). Additive only.
fileConflictWarnings.scripts/acceptance/scan-contract-chain.m: Modified by T-000 (add 4 CN-MET as PENDING) and T-007 (change to IMPLEMENTED check, 46 total).

executionNotes.commonComponents: T-002 creates shared method-step components (StepProgressIndicator, AiFillCard, DoNotAskAgainToggle) in src/features/common/method-step/. T-003, T-004, T-005 reuse them.
executionNotes.spikeReport: T-001 spike report is the critical decision point for T-005. Read before implementing Canvas 2.
executionNotes.preDispatchGate: T-000 runs pre-dispatch gate checks. If any command fails, BLOCKED — do not proceed to T-001.
executionNotes.finalGateBlockers: T-007 is verification only. If it finds failures, file a Fix Pulse ticket — do not fix in T-007.
